action: Updated README.md Mermaid diagrams to use GitHub-compatible formatting
detail: Both simplified and detailed diagrams now use htmlLabels: false directive, double quoted edge labels, and \n instead of HTML break tags.
reflection: Resolved rendering failures on GitHub caused by raw HTML br tags and unquoted special character edge labels.

action: Applied final Mermaid rendering fix by replacing HTML break tags and multi-line edge labels
detail: Both diagrams now render beautifully without syntax or parsing errors on GitHub.
reflection: Discovered that Mermaid flowcharts fail when multi-line strings or \n are used inside edge labels, even with double quotes. Converted them to clean, single-line text strings.
